code:
import io
import string

let line = io.read_line()
match line
when Some(s)
  let parts = string.split_whitespace(s)
  mut p = 0
  mut n = 0
  for tok in parts
    match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      if v > 0
        p = p + v
      else if v < 0
        n = n + v
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  let r = p - n
  print("r=#{r}")
when None
  print("r=0")
end
